overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character crosses a wet street intersection and proceeds along sidewalks beneath elevated highways and through covered commercial alleyways with vibrant holographic advertisements.

events.description: character finishes crossing street and steps onto sidewalk curb

agents.ego_description: walking across a broad yellow-striped crosswalk on wet reflective asphalt

large digital billboard displaying a woman's face with blue background
towering futuristic glass skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents
reflective wet road surface mirroring the colorful neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city intersection at night, with the character crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk. Neon billboards and towering glass skyscrapers dominate the background, their lights reflecting off the wet pavement. A few pedestrians are visible crossing in the same direction.

events.description: transitioning from open intersection to sidewalk beneath elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath a massive concrete highway overpass

tall vertical building with large yellow advertisement reading 'Worry-Free'
black iron fence running along the right edge of the sidewalk
tall modern street lamp illuminating the sidewalk with white light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, with the massive concrete structure dominating the upper frame. To the left, a tall building displays a bright yellow 'Worry-Free' advertisement, while traffic moves along the street. A black metal fence lines the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with retail buildings and signage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past commercial storefronts and signage

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing a light-colored jacket

red and white striped concrete barriers lining the sidewalk edge
large round concrete planter containing a small palm tree

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the commercial sidewalk, passing a building with a prominent orange 'BUDOKA' neon sign. Red and white concrete barriers and circular planters line the right side of the path, while the elevated highway remains visible to the left. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with food vendors and neon signage

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath building overhang with prominent neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered commercial area with bright neon storefront signs

entered.detail: large cyan and blue neon sign reading 'DATA INC' on dark building facade
bright red neon sign for 'Kabayan Foods' restaurant
extended building overhang creating covered walkway shelter

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered commercial walkway, passing beneath a building awning. A bright cyan 'DATA INC' sign and a red 'Kabayan Foods' neon sign illuminate the right side. The environment becomes more enclosed as the character approaches a narrower alley entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alley with red ambient lighting and outdoor seating

events.description: ambient lighting shifts to dominant red neon as character enters narrow alley

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alleyway illuminated by intense red neon lights

notable_agents.action: sitting at outdoor plastic table under white umbrella

entered.detail: intense red neon strips illuminating the alley ceiling and walls with crimson light
white patio umbrella with plastic chairs and tables for outdoor dining
graffiti and posters covering the tight corridor walls
pile of black garbage bags stacked against the alley wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a narrow, enclosed alleyway bathed in intense red neon light. The character walks past outdoor seating with white umbrellas and plastic chairs, where a pedestrian sits at a table. The walls are covered in posters and graffiti, with trash bags visible against the right wall, creating a gritty urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city that transitions from a wide, open intersection into a claustrophobic, gritty alleyway. It begins with the character crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst towering glass skyscrapers and wet pavement reflecting vibrant billboards. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts beneath the heavy concrete shadow of an elevated highway, passing a bright yellow Worry-Free advertisement and a prominent orange Budoka neon sign. The environment then becomes more enclosed as the camera follows the character under a building awning illuminated by cyan Data Inc and red Kabayan Foods signs. Finally, the path narrows into a dim alleyway bathed in intense red light, where the polished city facade gives way to graffiti-covered walls, trash bags, and outdoor seating.
